entries.title: Stablecoins flip automated clearing house volume in February
entries.snippet: Stablecoin monthly transaction volume hit $7.2 trillion in February, surpassing the $6.8 trillion processed by the Automated Clearing House network.
entries.tweet_text: Stablecoins flip automated clearing house volume in February

entries.title: Circle unveils plans for wrapped bitcoin token cirBTC
entries.snippet: Circle's bitcoin payments app Circle Pay was sunsetted in 2019 as the firm pivoted to focus solely on stablecoins.

entries.title: Coinbase Gets Conditional Approval From Banking Regulator—But Isn't Launching a Bank
entries.snippet: Coinbase said Thursday that it is the latest crypto firm to secure a conditional bank charter from the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency.
entries.tweet_text: @coinbase Gets Conditional Approval From Banking Regulator—But Isn't Launching a Bank

entries.title: SoFi launches 'Big Business Banking' combining fiat and crypto on a single regulated platform
entries.snippet: SoFi has launched a new enterprise banking platform with 24/7 payment support, combining fiat and crypto services.
entries.tweet_text: @SoFi launches 'Big Business Banking' combining fiat and crypto on a single regulated platform

entries.title: BitGo launches stablecoin minting and redemption for institutions
entries.snippet: The company is hoping to service 'market makers, liquidity providers, banks, exchanges, asset managers, and fintechs.'
entries.tweet_text: BitGo launches stablecoin minting and redemption for institutions

entries.title: Drift says $280M exploit tied to 'sophisticated' admin takeover; ZachXBT criticizes Circle over USDC handling
entries.snippet: Drift said Wednesday's $280 million exploit was a result of unauthorized transaction approvals, facilitated through durable nonce mechanisms.

entries.title: Bitget to Issue Visa Crypto Card for Spending Across APAC
entries.snippet: Bitget, the world’s largest Universal Exchange (UEX), in partnership with Visa and DCS, launched the Bitget Card across selected markets in Asia Pacific (APAC), extending crypto out of exchanges into everyday spending and marking another step toward a more unified financial experience where digital
entries.tweet_text: Bitget to Issue @Visa Crypto Card for Spending Across APAC

entries.title: Genius Group liquidates Bitcoin treasury to pay $8.5M of debt
entries.snippet: The AI and crypto company has added to a pattern of Bitcoin treasuries offloading this year, with Michael Saylor's Strategy bucking that trend.

entries.title: These Three Altcoins Just Got Leveraged Crypto ETFs
entries.snippet: Volatility Shares, the company that launched the first leveraged crypto fund in the U.S., is expanding its roster to smaller digital assets

entries.title: Treasury Proposes Its First Regulation to Implement GENIUS Act
entries.snippet: The Treasury Department proposed its first regulation to implement the stablecoin-focused GENIUS Act. The notice of proposed rulemaking (NPRM) issued Wednesday (April 1) would establish principles for determining whether a state-level regulatory regime is substantially similar to the federal framewo
entries.tweet_text: Treasury Proposes Its First Regulation to Implement GENIUS Act

entries.title: Charles Schwab, Citadel-backed EDX joins list of crypto firms seeking national trust bank charter
entries.snippet: Crypto organizations to have applied for the charter include Bridge, Ripple, Circle, BitGo, Fidelity Digital Assets, and Paxos.

entries.title: Dollar Dominance Looms Over Global Banks' G7 Stablecoin Ambitions
entries.snippet: At the end of 2025, when a consortium of ten global banks announced they were exploring a stablecoin tied to G7 currencies, the news carried the weight of inevitability. It suggested that traditional finance was finally prepared to institutionalize digital money at scale. In the months since, that i

entries.title: Naoris launches post-quantum blockchain as quantum security risks gain attention
entries.snippet: Naoris Protocol has launched a post-quantum layer-1 blockchain designed to protect transactions against future cryptographic vulnerabilities.

entries.title: Fed's Barr backs stablecoin clarity but warns of run risks
entries.snippet: US Fed Governor Michael Barr said clearer US rules could help the market grow, but warned that GENIUS Act implementation must still guard against runs, weak reserves and illicit finance.

entries.title: Crypto super PAC names Tether exec chairman as stablecoin debate in D.C. intensifies
entries.snippet: The debate over stablecoin rewards seems to be the final stumbling block to Congress passing the Clarity Act.

entries.title: Asset tokenization startup Brickken secures €3 million in funding
entries.snippet: Brickken, leading European tokenization infrastructure for financial institutions, has closed a €3 million pre-Series A round, bringing the company to a post-money valuation of €38 million.

entries.title: OpenEden issues first tokenized access to BNY's Global Short-Dated High-Yield Bond strategy
entries.snippet: OpenEden launches HYBOND token offering onchain access to BNY Investments’ Global Short-Dated High-Yield Bond strategy.
entries.tweet_text: OpenEden issues first tokenized access to BNY's Global Short-Dated High-Yield Bond strategy

entries.title: Rain and Episode Six form stablecoin alliance
entries.snippet: Rain, the enterprise-grade infrastructure for stablecoin-powered payments, today announced a strategic partnership with Episode Six, a leading global payment technology company and card issuer processor.

entries.title: CaixaBank rolls out crypto investment services
entries.snippet: CaixaBank is to roll out two bitcoin-based crypto-asset investment vehicles in the coming months, offering custody, reception and execution of buy and sell orders.
entries.tweet_text: CaixaBank rolls out crypto investment services

entries.title: B2C2 selects Solana as primary network for stablecoin settlement
entries.snippet: B2C2, a global leader in institutional digital asset liquidity, today announced a collaboration with the Solana Foundation to support institutional stablecoin activity on the Solana network.

entries.title: E-commerce giant Mercado Libre to sunset rewards-based Mercado Coin: Report
entries.snippet: The closure of Mercado Coin doesn't mark the end of Mercado Libre's crypto rewards strategy as it still offers the Meli Dolar (MUSD), a US-dollar stablecoin which launched in 2024.

entries.title: Exclusive: Former a16z crypto investor raises $10 million to launch stablecoin clearinghouse Better Money
entries.snippet: Exclusive: Former a16z crypto investor raises $10 million to launch stablecoin clearinghouse Better Money Fortune

entries.title: BitGo rolls out portfolio-based crypto lending platform for institutions
entries.snippet: Looking to streamline collateral management, the platform has enabled borrowing and lending against liquid, staked and locked assets within a single custody account.

entries.title: Europe risks 'digital dollarization' as banks race to launch euro stablecoin
entries.snippet: Europe risks ‘digital dollarization’ as banks race to launch euro stablecoin CoinDesk

entries.title: Plume pilots payroll system allowing employees to receive part of salary in WisdomTree tokenized fund
entries.snippet: Plume has launched a payroll pilot that lets employees receive part of their salary in tokenized money-market fund shares.

entries.title: Chainalysis introduces 'blockchain intelligence agents' trained on millions of investigations
entries.snippet: The autonomous bots are trained on Chainalysis' massive, proprietary dataset built from over a decade in business.

entries.title: Interactive Brokers launches crypto trading in EEA, including BTC, ETH, SOL and XRP
entries.snippet: Interactive Brokers launched crypto trading for eligible EEA investors, offering 11 cryptocurrencies alongside stocks and futures.
entries.tweet_text: Interactive Brokers launches crypto trading in EEA, including BTC, ETH, SOL and XRP

entries.title: MiCA-licensed crypto asset manager Tesseract unveils compliance-minded yield vaults
entries.snippet: Tesseract tested its vault architecture with six pilot participants, including crypto ETP issuer 21Shares.

entries.title: Unstable velocity: Standard Chartered says stablecoin usage rising faster than expected as new use cases emerge
entries.snippet: The bank maintained its $2 trillion stablecoin market cap forecast by 2028 amid a sharp increase in turnover from use cases like AI payments.

entries.title: Crypto exchange KuCoin agrees to $500K settlement, ending CFTC case
entries.snippet: KuCoin’s parent company will pay $500,000 to resolve CFTC charges, marking a fraction of the $300 million it previously agreed to pay the DOJ over similar charges.

entries.title: Senator Questions SEC Over Treatment of Trump-Linked Crypto Businesses
entries.snippet: Senator Richard Blumenthal wants the agency to answer whether it softened enforcement against allies of President Donald Trump.

entries.title: Swift says blockchain-based shared ledger will go live with real transactions this year
entries.snippet: Swift has begun building the first iteration of its blockchain-based shared ledger, enabling interoperability between banks’ tokenised deposits to facilitate 24/7 cross-border payments.
entries.tweet_text: Swift says blockchain-based shared ledger will go live with real transactions this year

entries.title: Mitsubishi adopts JPMorgan blockchain for corporate payments
entries.snippet: JPMorgan’s Kinexys network is gaining traction among corporations as blockchain-based payment rails scale toward $10 billion in daily transaction volume.
entries.tweet_text: Mitsubishi adopts @jpmorgan blockchain for corporate payments

entries.title: Nium Rolls Out Platform for Issuing Stablecoin Cards
entries.snippet: Cross-border payments/card issuance company Nium has launched its stablecoin card issuance platform. entries.title: Anchorage Digital, Chainlink back new crypto PAC as election season heats up
entries.snippet: A new political action committee, the Blockchain Leadership Fund, launched with backing from Anchorage Digital and Chainlink Labs.

entries.title: The SEC's latest crypto guidance still leaves too much unsaid
Midas raises $50 million Series A, launches liquidity layer for tokenized assets
entries.snippet: Midas raised a $50 million Series A led by RRE and Creandum, and launched a $40 million liquidity facility for tokenized assets.
entries.tweet_text: Midas raises $50 million Series A, launches liquidity layer for tokenized assets

entries.title: Nium launches dual-network stablecoin card issuance platform
entries.snippet: B2B cross-border payments infrastructure provider Nium has launched a duel-network stablecoin card issuance platform, enabling businesses to spend digital dollars at hundreds of millions of merchant locations worldwide.

entries.title: Trilitech broadens tokenized commodities push on Tezos with Metals.io
entries.snippet: Trilitech launched a new platform for trading tokenized uranium and metals that are critical for the development of the artificial intelligence industry.

entries.title: Aave goes live on X Layer, enabling onchain lending for OKX Wallet users
entries.snippet: OKX Wallet users can supply assets, including USDT0, xBTC, and xETH, to earn yield that compounds automatically without giving up custody.
